reviews.comment:
Horrible experiencia de usuario

Cargue nafta y el total no entraba en mi tarjeta de debito, asi que ante el inconveniente pedi pagar mitad en efectivo y mitad en la tarjeta.

Esto genero mucho enojo en la persona que me atendio el dia 31 de julio de 2018 a la noche, me maltrato en todos los sentidos posbles.
-Lanzando malas palabras al aire porque se le trabo el papel en el  POST
-Luego me hizo firmar su ticket y no me entrego el mio.
-Cuando pedi mi ticket me volvio a maltratar.

Frases como:

Dale pa
Me atrazas la operacion pa
Ahora vas a tener que esperar pa, estaciona por ahi

Y asi todo con PA hasta que despues de 20 minutos decidio terminar de atenderme.

No sin antes contarle a su companero delante mio lo sucedido como si fuera la primera vez que pasa algo asi.

En resumen esa persona me hizo conectarme dos dias despues y escribir una opinion por primera vez en google. Sieguiente parada atencion al cliente de YPF.

Ahh por ultimo, desde ese dia no comprare otra vez en YPF ni un litro de soda, tambien estoy haciendo los tramites para que la flota completa de la empresa para la que trabajo se cambie a Shell.

Maltrato = Perdidas,

(Translated by Google)
Horrible user experience

I filled up with gas and the total wouldn't fit on my debit card, so, faced with the problem, I asked to pay half in cash and half by card.

This made the person who served me on the night of July 31, 2018, very angry. They mistreated me in every way possible.

- They swore because the paper got stuck in the POS machine.

- Then they made me sign their receipt and didn't give me mine.

- When I asked for my receipt, they mistreated me again.

Phrases like:

"Come on, man."
"You're slowing me down, man."

"Now you're going to have to wait, man, park over there."

And so on with this person until, after 20 minutes, they finally decided to finish serving me.

Not before telling their colleague what had happened in front of me, as if it were the first time something like this had ever occurred.

In short, that person made me log on two days later and write a review on Google for the first time. Next stop: YPF customer service.

Oh, and lastly, from that day on, I won't buy a single liter of soda at YPF again. I'm also starting the process to switch the entire fleet of the company I work for to Shell.

Bad service = Losses
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvdDlEYTZBRRAB
